meta.purpose: Candidate dimension pool for memory-bank generation. Deeppersona picks a persona-appropriate subset per user; the user's stance goes in short/explanation, never in the dim name.
source_frameworks: O*NET Skills taxonomy (US Dept of Labor)
meta.design_rule: Every dim is AXIS-NEUTRAL — two users with OPPOSITE stances must both plausibly have this dim. Naming the axis is OK; naming the answer is NOT.
meta.how_to_use: Treat as a candidate pool. For each user, select dims whose axis has a meaningful stance given that persona; skip axes that would be empty or forced.
meta.core_dims_note: Each category's 2 core dims (e.g. core_skill / skill_gap) are kept separate in generate_memory_bank.py::_CATEGORY_CONFIGS and are NOT in this pool — the pool supplies the EXTRA slots.

skill_memory.name: reading_comprehension_skill
skill_memory.axis: How well do they extract meaning from written text?

skill_memory.name: active_listening_skill
skill_memory.axis: How well do they attend to and understand others' speech?

skill_memory.name: speaking_skill
skill_memory.axis: How well do they communicate verbally?

skill_memory.axis: How comfortable are they applying mathematics to real problems?

skill_memory.name: active_learning_skill

skill_memory.axis: How accurately do they assess their own performance?

skill_memory.name: coordination_skill

skill_memory.axis: How well do they tackle unfamiliar, multi-step problems?

skill_memory.name: troubleshooting_skill
skill_memory.axis: How well do they diagnose what's going wrong in a system?

skill_memory.name: repairing_skill

skill_memory.name: time_management_skill

skill_memory.name: financial_resource_management_skill

skill_memory.name: material_resource_management_skill
skill_memory.axis: How well do they use / stock / conserve materials?

skill_memory.name: personnel_management_skill
skill_memory.axis: How well do they direct others' work?

skill_memory.name: capability_under_pressure
skill_memory.axis: How does their skill change under time / stakes / stress?

skill_memory.name: adaptive_capability
skill_memory.axis: How well do they adjust skill to novel conditions?

skill_memory.name: strategic_judgment_capability
skill_memory.axis: How well do they know WHEN to apply which skill?

skill_memory.name: procedural_breadth
skill_memory.axis: How many different procedures can they execute competently?

episodic_memory.name: turning_point_event
episodic_memory.axis: A moment that redirected the course of their life

episodic_memory.name: first_major_success_event
episodic_memory.axis: An early success that shaped what they believed they could do

episodic_memory.name: loss_or_bereavement_event
episodic_memory.axis: A death or major loss that reshaped them

episodic_memory.name: betrayal_or_conflict_event
episodic_memory.axis: A trust-breaking event with lasting impact on how they relate to others

episodic_memory.name: unexpected_kindness_event
episodic_memory.axis: Help they received when they didn't expect it

episodic_memory.name: identity_reorganizing_event
episodic_memory.axis: A moment that forced them to revise who they thought they were

episodic_memory.name: moment_of_clarity_event
episodic_memory.axis: A sudden insight that changed their direction

episodic_memory.name: relocation_or_migration_event
episodic_memory.axis: A move that broke or shifted their social/environmental context

episodic_memory.name: career_transition_event
episodic_memory.axis: A work / vocation change that reshaped daily life

episodic_memory.name: creative_breakthrough_event
episodic_memory.axis: A creative/intellectual breakthrough they still draw on

episodic_memory.name: financial_shock_event
episodic_memory.axis: A financial event that reshaped their approach to money

episodic_memory.name: health_crisis_event
episodic_memory.axis: A health scare/diagnosis/injury that changed them

episodic_memory.name: family_crisis_event
episodic_memory.axis: A family-level crisis that shaped obligations/roles

episodic_memory.name: workplace_conflict_event
episodic_memory.axis: An on-the-job conflict with lasting effect

episodic_memory.name: legal_or_administrative_event
episodic_memory.axis: A legal/bureaucratic encounter that taught them something

episodic_memory.name: emergency_response_event
episodic_memory.axis: A disaster / accident / emergency they navigated

episodic_memory.name: public_event_witnessed
episodic_memory.axis: A public-scale event (historical moment, collective incident) they witnessed personally

episodic_memory.name: relational_commitment_event
episodic_memory.axis: A relationship milestone (marriage / breakup / reconnection / cutoff)

episodic_memory.name: parent_child_defining_event
episodic_memory.axis: An episode with a parent or child that anchors how they see family

episodic_memory.name: childhood_defining_event
episodic_memory.axis: A childhood episode they believe shaped them

episodic_memory.name: reminiscence_bump_event

episodic_memory.name: moral_dilemma_event
episodic_memory.axis: A situation where they had to weigh competing moral demands

episodic_memory.name: unexpected_windfall_event
episodic_memory.axis: An unexpected positive turn that changed possibilities

episodic_memory.name: cultural_encounter_event
episodic_memory.axis: An encounter with a very different culture/worldview that affected them

episodic_memory.name: accomplishment_under_pressure_event
episodic_memory.axis: A high-pressure accomplishment that confirmed their capability

episodic_memory.name: mentor_or_teacher_event
episodic_memory.axis: An encounter with a mentor/teacher they still reference

self_model.name: fearfulness_self_view

self_model.name: anxiety_self_view
self_model.axis: How anxious do they believe they are in daily life?

self_model.name: emotional_dependence_self_view

self_model.name: sentimentality_self_view

self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as hard-working vs avoidant?

self_model.name: perfectionism_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as detail-exacting vs good-enough?

self_model.name: prudence_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as measured/cautious vs impulsive?

self_model.name: aesthetic_appreciation_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as moved by beauty/art?

self_model.name: inquisitiveness_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as curious about the world?

self_model.name: creativity_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as creative?

self_model.name: unconventionality_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as unconventional vs conforming?

self_model.axis: How coherent/consistent do they feel their self-image is?

self_model.name: self_efficacy_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they believe they can accomplish what they set out to?

self_model.name: self_consistency_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they believe they act consistently across different contexts?

self_model.name: identity_anchor

self_model.name: growth_orientation_self_view
self_model.axis: Do they see themselves as open to growth vs fixed?

self_model.name: dependability_self_view

assistance_preference.name: formality_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How formal vs casual do they want the assistant to be?

assistance_preference.name: verbosity_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How much text do they want per response?

assistance_preference.name: pacing_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How fast / how many steps at once?

assistance_preference.name: directness_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Should the assistant hedge or be blunt?

assistance_preference.name: tone_preference
assistance_preference.axis: What emotional tone do they want?

assistance_preference.name: jargon_tolerance
assistance_preference.axis: How much domain jargon is welcome?

assistance_preference.name: explanation_depth_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How deep should explanations go?

assistance_preference.name: detail_level_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Include edge cases / caveats / context?

assistance_preference.name: format_preference
assistance_preference.axis: What output format do they want?

assistance_preference.name: structure_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How structured vs exploratory should the response be?

assistance_preference.name: emotional_support_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Do they want validation / acknowledgement?

assistance_preference.name: autonomy_support_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Should the assistant prescribe or collaborate?

assistance_preference.name: proactive_suggestion_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Should the assistant volunteer related suggestions?

assistance_preference.name: confirmation_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Should the assistant confirm before acting vs just do?

assistance_preference.name: example_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Do they learn better from abstract rules or concrete examples?

assistance_preference.name: source_citation_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Do they want sources / citations?

assistance_preference.name: decision_delegation_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How much of the decision do they want the AI to make?

assistance_preference.name: feedback_style_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How should the assistant point out mistakes?

assistance_preference.name: language_register_preference
assistance_preference.axis: What language register fits them?

assistance_preference.name: humor_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Do they want humor in responses?

assistance_preference.name: cultural_context_preference
assistance_preference.axis: Do they want cultural references fitted to their context?

assistance_preference.name: repetition_tolerance
assistance_preference.axis: Do they want recaps / reminders across turns?

assistance_preference.name: pushback_tolerance
assistance_preference.axis: Should the assistant push back when they say something risky/wrong?

assistance_preference.name: privacy_disclosure_preference
assistance_preference.axis: How much personal detail do they want to share / have remembered?
